rows.salesforce_capability: Client navigation, object tabs, and list/detail/right-panel workspace
rows.boundary: Client workspace is API-backed and fail-closed; no static local data fallback.
Opportunity handoff refreshes safe Intake/Opportunity state; direct Matter creation remains backend-blocked.
Runtime facade writes do not mutate canonical Master Data yet; canonical write migration stays backend-first.

rows.salesforce_capability: Salesforce Contact object read/create/patch and Account-Contact relationship read
rows.boundary: Merge/delete execution stays backend-first; raw contact values remain hidden.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter navigation, list views, selected record workspace, and right panel
rows.boundary: Selected Matter context drives downstream sections; broader mass update remains backend-first.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter path status, owner assignment/change, inline edit, and bulk status
rows.boundary: Only tested status, owner, inline WIP, and selected bulk completion controls are exposed.
Activity write, calendar, deadline, and channel composers are hidden until route/provider gates pass.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter DMS files, Vault inventory, search, audit, and document facade
rows.boundary: Document bytes, raw storage paths, and raw text stay hidden.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter billing, ERP invoices, WIP, payments, and finance audit
rows.boundary: Generic import/data mapping remains separate SF-B-W05 backend-first work.

rows.salesforce_capability: Matter analytics dashboards, matter profitability, refresh, and export
rows.boundary: Report builder and Client profitability route exposure remain SF-B-W08 backend-first work.
